title: polygala vulgaris subsp. alpestris
intro: Polygala vulgaris subsp. alpestris, also known as Alpine Milkwort, is a flowering plant species within the Polygalaceae family. This perennial plant is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alpine Milkwort include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Alpine Milkwort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
